name: Income Split Calculator
description: Split income based on percentage share.

example.explanation: Split income based on percentage share between collaborators.

faqs.question: What is this for?
faqs.answer: Useful for splitting revenue, commissions, or ownership-based payouts.

faqs.question: Can shares exceed 100%?
faqs.answer: No, shares should add up to 100% across participants.

faqs.question: Can I split multiple ways?
faqs.answer: Yes, calculate each share separately and ensure they sum to 100%.
